eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 2:06 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 3:06 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert from Wheeler County Sheriff's Office: The evacuation level for Multiple Zones in the Rowe Complex fires have been upgraded from Level 2 to a Level 3- GO NOW! Evacuate Immediately. There is significant danger in your area. If you need evacuation assistance call Frontier Regional 9-1-1 Center at 541-384-2080.
